spec_match.rationale: The concept beautifully pairs a step-by-step API walkthrough with actual backend server endpoints to sign and cryptographically validate custom user emails.

interactive.rationale: Users can run through the five registration stages, enter custom data, and trigger live cryptographic validation.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Properly matches the core EVP intent of replacing the traditional, friction-heavy email OTP dance.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes clear instructions for developer fallbacks when the user denies permission or the API is unavailable.

references.rationale: The see also section includes the required chromestatus.com/feature/5205725253074944 reference link.

design_system.rationale: Adheres perfectly to the design system, uses focus styles, and handles responsive layouts elegantly.

summary: The registration-flow is a top-tier interactive demo showing client API usage integrated with real backend cryptographic token validation, and now satisfies the required ChromeStatus reference invariant.
